title: Intensely Smoky Saudi Arabian Shrimp Paste Skewers
description: A smoky, crunchy, and comforting Saudi Arabian dish featuring shrimp paste, this recipe is vegan-friendly and perfect for a snack or dinner, it is made by brine-drying the shrimp paste to give it a unique texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the shrimp paste, smoked paprika, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Thread small balls of the shrimp paste mixture onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each ball.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to 450 degrees Fahrenheit and bake the skewers for an additional 5 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the skewers hot and enjoy.

To brine-dry the shrimp paste, mix 1 cup of water with 1 tablespoon of salt and stir until the salt is dissolved, then add the shrimp paste and let it sit for 30 minutes before rinsing and proceeding with the recipe.
